prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 2.0L (1995cc) *828.50* supercharged inline-4 with a fully built *828.70* block (bored to 2.1L, 2111cc) using forged Mahle pistons (83.5mm bore, 97mm stroke), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons. Pair with a custom Abarth-designed Volumex supercharger (VX34) ported and polished by Rotrex, running 18 psi of boost with a custom intercooler setup from Bell Intercoolers (dual-core, 500x220x76mm) and a 3-inch aluminum charge piping system from Vibrant Performance.

Forced Induction: Replace the stock Weber IAW fuel injection with a fully programmable Motec M150 ECU, paired with a set of 8x Bosch Motorsport 0280158001 1000cc injectors and a high-flow fuel pump from Walbro (450 LPH). The supercharger is driven by a custom 10-rib serpentine belt system from Gates, with a Fluidampr harmonic balancer to manage crankshaft harmonics. Exhaust system features a custom 3-inch stainless steel header from Janspeed, paired with a straight-pipe exhaust using a 3.5-inch titanium muffler from Akrapovič, terminating in dual 100mm outlets.

Suspension & Chassis: Install a full Group B-spec rally suspension setup using Ohlins TTX40 4-way adjustable coilovers (22-way rebound, 22-way compression) with custom valving for gravel/tarmac transitions. The front subframe is reinforced with a custom tubular steel brace from GPA Racing, while the rear features a multi-link reinforcement kit from Techno Motorsport. Braking is upgraded to a full AP Racing setup: 6-piston CP8300 calipers (38mm pistons) up front with 355mm two-piece rotors (floating, slotted) and 4-piston CP5550 calipers (32mm pistons) at the rear with 330mm rotors. Brake lines are replaced with Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel braided lines, and the system runs Motul RBF 660 racing brake fluid.
estetica: Bodywork: Replace the stock fiberglass panels with a full carbon fiber replica body kit from Zender (original Group B homologation specs), including the iconic wide fender flares, front splitter, and rear diffuser. The hood features a custom carbon fiber scoop from Seibon Carbon, designed to direct airflow into the Volumex supercharger. The rear wing is a custom 3D-printed carbon fiber unit from 9 Lives Racing, adjustable for angle of attack (0-15 degrees) and featuring integrated Gurney flaps.

Aerodynamics: Install a full underbody aero package from APR Performance, including a front diffuser, rear diffuser, and a flat underfloor panel to reduce drag and increase downforce. The front bumper is modified with a custom aluminum mesh grille from Custom Cages, while the rear features a carbon fiber ducktail spoiler from Varis. Side skirts are replaced with carbon fiber units from Rocket Bunny, designed to channel airflow around the widened rear fenders.

Interior: Replace the stock interior with a full Group B-spec rally setup. The dashboard is replaced with a carbon fiber unit from AIM Motorsport, featuring a 12.3-inch digital display for the Motec M150 ECU. The seats are Recaro Pole Position II carbon fiber shells with Schroth 6-point harnesses, mounted to a custom FIA-approved roll cage from Custom Cages (chromoly steel, 45mm diameter). The steering wheel is a suede-wrapped Momo Prototipo (330mm diameter) with a quick-release hub, and the pedals are replaced with aluminum units from Sparco. The floor is covered with a custom rubberized coating from U-Pol Raptor for weight reduction and durability.
